notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Bobby Witt Jr. steals (27) 2nd base. Bobby Witt Jr. to 3rd. Bobby Witt Jr. advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by first baseman Luis García Jr.

notableEvents.label: Maikel Garcia GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Maikel Garcia grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr. Jac Caglianone out at 2nd. Maikel Garcia out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Collins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Collins flies out to second baseman Nasim Nuñez.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Collins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Collins singles on a line drive to left fielder Dylan Crews. Lane Thomas scores. Bobby Witt Jr. scores.

notableEvents.label: Michael Massey pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Massey flies out to left fielder Dylan Crews.

notableEvents.label: Jac Caglianone GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Curtis Mead. Bobby Witt Jr. out at 2nd. Jac Caglianone out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Nick Loftin to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Luis García Jr. out at 2nd. Curtis Mead out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: José Tena pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Tena flies out sharply to center fielder Kameron Misner.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
